summary: Frontend testing completed for NASSAQ system pre-deployment fixes. All 5 features tested and verified: Users Management page displays users correctly, Daily Platform Activity chart shows data, Quick Actions moved to top in single row, Date display improved, Footer has all 5 social media links.
critical_code_review_comments: UsersManagement.jsx - Page displays users correctly with 50 user cards, statistics (Total Users, Schools, Teachers), filters, and action buttons (View, Suspend, Edit, Delete, Notify)
Platform Admin Dashboard - Daily activity chart (نشاط المنصة اليومي) shows real-time data with multiple series (Users, Attendance, Grades) and time axis
SchoolDashboardContent.jsx - Quick Actions moved to top header row with compact inline buttons (طالب, معلم, فصل, جدول, الحصص, إشعار)
SchoolDashboardContent.jsx - Date display improved with day name (الثلاثاء) and formatted date (١٠ مارس ٢٠٢٦) with calendar icon
Footer.jsx - All 5 social media links present with correct URLs and data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Users Management shows 50 users with full CRUD actions. Daily activity chart displays real-time data. Quick Actions are compact inline buttons at top of School Principal dashboard. Footer has all 5 social links (X, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Snapchat).

1_users_management_page.description: Users Management page in Platform Admin displays users correctly
verified: Page loads at /admin/users with data-testid='users-management'
Statistics cards show: إجمالي المستخدمين (50), إجمالي المدارس (5), طلبات معلقة (13)
50 user cards displayed with names, emails, roles, and status badges
Each card has action buttons: عرض, تعليق, تعديل, حذف, إشعار
Filters available: جميع الحسابات, جميع الأدوار, كل الحالات
Search functionality present

2_daily_platform_activity.description: Daily Platform Activity in Platform Admin shows chart with data
verified: نشاط المنصة اليومي section found on admin dashboard
Chart displays with time axis (07:00 - 16:00)
Multiple data series: إظهار, الحضور, الدرجات, المستخدمين
مباشر (Live) badge indicates real-time data
140 chart elements (SVG) found on page

3_quick_actions_moved_to_top.description: Quick Actions in School Principal dashboard moved to top in single row
verified: data-testid='quick-actions-inline' found at top of dashboard
6 compact inline buttons in single row: طالب, معلم, فصل, جدول, الحصص, إشعار
All buttons have correct data-testid attributes
Buttons are small (h-8 px-3) with icons and short labels

4_date_display_improved.description: Date display improved in School Principal dashboard
verified: Day name displayed: الثلاثاء (Tuesday)
Full date shown: ١٠ مارس ٢٠٢٦ (10 March 2026)
Calendar icon present next to date
Date section in gradient background header

5_footer_social_links.description: Footer has all 5 correct social media links
verified: X (Twitter): https://x.com/nassaqapp - data-testid='social-twitter'
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nassaqapp/ - data-testid='social-instagram'
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nassaqapp - data-testid='social-linkedin'
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@nassaqapp - data-testid='social-tiktok'
Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/nassaqapp?share_id=2ADaRX5hyPY&locale=en-US - data-testid='social-snapchat'
